title: What do you think Shinji would enjoy learning to cook
display_title: What do you think Shinji would enjoy learning to cook
wikitext:
[]: What do you think Shinji would enjoy learning to cook?             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat Apr 28, 2018 7:04 pm Just what the title says.

[]: Re: What do you think Shinji would enjoy learning to cook?             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Sat Apr 28, 2018 7:10 pm Well IMO, not specific dishes, but things his friends would enjoy eating. Shinji tries his best to please people, and perfecting their favorite dishes would make him feel happy. As for himself, Shinji may be adventurous enough to buy a cookbook and then just try to see how well he can cook it.

[]: Re: What do you think Shinji would enjoy learning to cook?             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Apr 29, 2018 11:21 am If SIRP is anything to go by, pretty much any traditional Japanese dish

[]: Re: What do you think Shinji would enjoy learning to cook?             Quote Post by ACGT-Samael » Fri May 04, 2018 12:37 pm All I can picture when I see Shinji in the kitchen is him saying "I mustn't burn the soup" over and over again ad nausiem. Thing is, I don't think Shinji WOULD enjoy cooking, or at least he'd never admit to it. We're talking about a kid who can't even take a compliment about his cello skills. Unless he's cooking with Kaworu, then all bets are off.

[]: Re: What do you think Shinji would enjoy learning to cook?             Quote Post by ShonHam » Mon Aug 06, 2018 2:00 pm I imagine nothing in particular honestly, he's just that kinda guy I think

[]: Re: What do you think Shinji would enjoy learning to cook?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Sep 05, 2018 10:40 am DarkBluePhoenix wrote: Well IMO, not specific dishes, but things his friends would enjoy eating. Shinji tries his best to please people, and perfecting their favorite dishes would make him feel happy. As for himself, Shinji may be adventurous enough to buy a cookbook and then just try to see how well he can cook it.

[]: Re: What do you think Shinji would enjoy learning to cook?             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Wed Sep 05, 2018 11:54 am ^ That sounds about right. Though I'd guess it happened every time he cooked something specifically for Asuka. But I think you left out the part where Asuka wonders silently why Shinji isn't asking to eat with her, and muttering "Baka Shinji" while she blushes as she walks away.

[]: Re: What do you think Shinji would enjoy learning to cook?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Sep 05, 2018 3:57 pm DarkBluePhoenix wrote: ^ That sounds about right. Though I'd guess it happened every time he cooked something specifically for Asuka. But I think you left out the part where Asuka wonders silently why Shinji isn't asking to eat with her, and muttering "Baka Shinji" while she blushes as she walks away.

[]: Re: What do you think Shinji would enjoy learning to cook?             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Wed Sep 05, 2018 5:06 pm Now what would Mari's reaction be to like fish & chips or bangers n' mash?

[]: Re: What do you think Shinji would enjoy learning to cook?             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Wed Sep 05, 2018 5:50 pm DarkBluePhoenix wrote: Now what would Mari's reaction be to like fish & chips or bangers n' mash?

[]: Re: What do you think Shinji would enjoy learning to cook?             Quote Post by ZQFMGB » Sat Sep 08, 2018 8:36 am Veggie food for Rei ! Also, I'd like to see what would happen if he cooked something very spiced to his dad. Would Gendo be able to keep his calm ?

[]: Re: What do you think Shinji would enjoy learning to cook?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Sep 09, 2018 5:53 pm Well, Asuka mentions something about Shinji being unable to handle the spicy in 2.0, but that might just be her assumption rather than the reality. Of course there would be some hilarity if it were true.... and Gendo was exactly the same

[]: Re: What do you think Shinji would enjoy learning to cook?             Quote Post by ZQFMGB » Mon Sep 10, 2018 4:53 am Asuka isn't a reliable source, she just likes bitching about everything and she's probably jealous of Shinji's cooking skills.

[]: Re: What do you think Shinji would enjoy learning to cook?             Quote Post by Joseki » Mon Sep 10, 2018 10:40 am I think Shinji would like to cook something that can be done with other people like pizza.
